summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Batch Card View feature on Batch Entry page. All 13 test cases passed. Table/Card view toggle works correctly, Card view displays all batch details in 2-column grid, Print button visible only in Card view, Date filter works in both views, Edit/Delete buttons work from Card view.
passed_tests: Table/Card view toggle buttons exist and work
Table view is active by default
Card view displays batch cards in 2-column grid (lg:grid-cols-2)
Found 10 batch cards in Card view
Each card shows: batch number, date, product name, output type badge (semi-finished/finished)
Each card shows: Milk Intake section (qty, fat%, snf%, fat rate, snf rate)
Each card shows: Raw Materials Used table (Milk + other RM with qty, rate, cost)
Each card shows: Cost summary (milk cost, RM cost, total) with highlighted Cost/Unit
Print button visible only in Card view when batches exist
Print button hidden in Table view
Summary bar shows Total Milk, Total Produced, Total Cost in Card view
Date range filter works in Table view (filtered to 2 batches for 2026-03-22)
Date range filter works in Card view (same filter shows 2 batches)
Edit button works from Card view (opens Edit Batch modal with populated data)
Delete button visible in Card view for admin user
Create Batch button exists and accessible
Table view still works as before (regression check passed)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 10 batches in the database.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch Card View feature fully tested. Key data-testids: table-view-btn, card-view-btn, print-batches-btn, batch-card-{id}, batch-cost-highlight-{id}, card-edit-batch-{id}, card-delete-batch-{id}. 10 batches exist in DB. Card view shows 2-column grid with full batch details including Milk Intake, Raw Materials Used table, and highlighted Cost/Unit. Print button uses window.open() for print-optimized layout. Date filter works in both views.
screenshots: .screenshots/batch_edit_form.png - Edit Batch modal from card view
